c.d: Whether the app supports iOS, Android, desktop, or other devices
Number of podcasts available to listen to or subscribe
Availability of advanced features such as voice boost, trim silence, sleep timer, curated playlists, cloud sync, transcript support
Ease of use, interface design, and user control like advanced playback speed, skip silences, and queue management
Availability as a free app or requires subscription/payment for premium features
User ratings on app stores and overall popularity among podcast listeners
